name: crawlipop
description: A small SEO ops dashboard for Search Console insights, behavior analysis, and Linear handoff.

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check lib/auth.mjs && node --check lib/behavior-analysis.mjs && node --check lib/config.mjs && node --check lib/data-store.mjs && node --check lib/demo-data.mjs && node --check lib/google-search-console.mjs && node --check lib/linear.mjs && node --check lib/posthog.mjs && node --check lib/recommendations.mjs && node --check public/app.js
scripts.test:all: npm run check && npm test && npm run test:e2e
